name: LinkedIn direct message
triage_rule: Acknowledge in 48h; ask qualifying question if persona is unclear; route to founder if PERSONA-INVESTOR-* or PERSONA-IDEA-PROPOSER
notes: Initiative 31 P3 seed. Cold dominant; warm exceptions arrive when sender references a bridge person.

name: LinkedIn post response or comment
triage_rule: Public visibility; respond per brand voice; never share confidential info
notes: Brand-surface-sensitive; prefer public response over private DM unless confidentiality required.

name: Email inbound (holistika@)
triage_rule: Auto-acknowledge in 24h; route to handoff_role per persona; ask for bridge confirmation when typical_distance_band >= N2
notes: The widest-range channel: anything from N1 known-counterparty to N4 cold form-spam can land here.

name: Web contact form on holistikaresearch.com
triage_rule: Auto-respond with intake template; route to PMO for triage within 7d; require qualifying answer before scheduling
notes: Cold by definition; the form is the canonical N4 channel.

name: Cal.com scheduling link
triage_rule: Link is shared deliberately; assumed deep context; default to call as scheduled
notes: N1 by deliberate sharing of the link; if a Cal booking arrives from someone unknown investigate first.

name: Paid ad → landing page
triage_rule: Lead-form intake; KiRBe waitlist or service-prospect intake; route to PMO
notes: Future channel (no live ads today); treat as cold N4 inbound when activated.

name: Google search → site
triage_rule: Same as web form; site SEO is the front door; intake form catches qualified prospects
notes: Organic SEO; founder testimony notes Google indexing brings random visitors.

name: Direct DM (WhatsApp / SMS / personal email)
triage_rule: Personal channel; assumed mutual contact; respond same-day if message is operational
notes: Bidirectional; founder uses for both inbound from N1-N2 trusted contacts and outbound vendor sourcing.

name: Inbound via partner referral
triage_rule: Partner forwards in; first response references the partner as bridge; tighter SLA than cold
notes: By definition N2 (the partner is the bridge). Highest conversion of any inbound channel.

name: In-person or virtual event meeting
triage_rule: Live-context conversation; capture the contact in GOI/POI register within 24h with assessed distance band; follow up with persona-matched intro pack within 1 week
notes: Founder-attended events; distance assessment happens at the event itself.
